queue.label: Create usePollingFetch custom hook to consolidate all fetch+poll patterns
queue.prompt: Read ~/Projects/command-center/refactor-spec.md section 1 (usePollingFetch Hook). Implement it exactly as described. queue.label: Create extensible widget registry to replace hardcoded Dashboard maps

queue.label: Add per-widget ErrorBoundary component to prevent full dashboard crashes
queue.prompt: Read ~/Projects/command-center/refactor-spec.md section 5 (Error Boundaries). Implement it exactly as described. Create src/components/ErrorBoundary.jsx as a class component with name prop, getDerivedStateFromError, componentDidCatch (console.error with widget name), and a Retry button that resets the error state. The fallback UI must have role=alert, display the widget name and error message, and a Retry button. Add .widget-error styles to styles.css under the WIDGETS section. Then in Dashboard.jsx, wrap each rendered widget in <ErrorBoundary name={title}> in the render loop. After changes, run `npm run build` and verify zero errors.

queue.label: Migrate Kanban from custom drag system to @dnd-kit/core+sortable
queue.prompt: Read ~/Projects/command-center/refactor-spec.md section 2 (Kanban Migration to dnd-kit). Implement it exactly as described. Refactor src/components/widgets/Kanban.jsx to use @dnd-kit/core and @dnd-kit/sortable. Already installed. Remove ALL: pointer event handlers, getDropTarget, getBoundingClientRect, querySelector calls, activeDrag state, keyboard shortcuts (e, E, Delete, Enter). Add: DndContext with sensors (PointerSensor with 6px distance, TouchSensor with 180ms delay/8px tolerance, KeyboardSensor with sortableKeyboardCoordinates), collisionDetection=closestCorners, SortableContext per column, useDroppable per column, useSortable per card, DragOverlay with semi-transparent card clone. Implement onDragStart, onDragOver, onDragEnd (same-column arrayMove + cross-column splice), onDragCancel with snapshot revert. Keep existing CardEditor modal, columns config, card shape. Use storage service for persistence. After changes, run `npm run build` and verify zero errors.

(2) Split the timer into two useEffects: one with setInterval at 1000ms for the time display, one with setInterval at 60000ms for the date display. Cleanup both intervals. queue.label: Fix resetLayout: clear cc_ keys + reset state instead of location.reload()
queue.prompt: Read ~/Projects/command-center/refactor-spec.md section 6.2 (resetLayout). In LayoutContext.jsx: replace the current resetLayout() implementation. Instead of calling window.location.reload(), use storage.clear() to wipe all cc_ keys, then reset all React state (layout, activeTab, etc.) to their initial defaults. Do NOT call location.reload(). The dashboard re-renders with default layout because state changed. After changes, run `npm run build` and verify zero errors.
